feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Graph
feed.subtitle: SAP Graph Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Is SAP Graph storing the data
entry.content:
Hi ,
Please help me resolve some of my doubts on  SAP Graph

1. How the data from SAP Graph is stored, is the data being stored at the graph layer on cloud or on each time we call the graph url , is it getting the data from server.
2. If we are using the Graph to combine two odata API from on prem/ cloud, on each time we call the graph api , will we be getting the latest data or do we have to activate the BDG to get the latest data.
3. After creating the graph , we are able to see a namespace called sap.graph , what is the importance of that and when to use it.

Thanks and Regards,
Keerthana

entry.title: When I am creating the vendor getting error like allocate the last number of the interval
entry.content: When I am creating the vendor getting error like allocate the last number of the interval

entry.title: Beas in Item Structure
entry.content:
Hi,

Can anyone help me on . What are the table Beas apply in Item Structure multi level BOM (Sub level Bom). How to do in sql level1, level2, level3 and level 4.I need output exactly same as item structure. Kindly help me the issue.

Thanks. 

Regards,

Seetha

entry.title: Como fazer um Ranking de 10 maiores valores no gráfico de ponto numérico no SAC?
entry.content:
Estou tentando desenvolver um gráfico de barras que mostre o ranking dos 10 principais itens e clientes, juntamente com o total da soma desses valores. No entanto, estou enfrentando dificuldades para garantir que o total represente apenas os 10 primeiros itens, em vez de todos os itens. Também tentei criar um gráfico de ponto numérico para exibir a soma dos 10 itens mais vendidos, mas ele está mostrando a soma de todos os itens. Alguém tem alguma sugestão de como posso garantir que o total represente apenas a soma dos 10 itens mais classificados?

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Su24
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Good day.

If any one changed the authorization objects in Su24 I want to troubleshoot those changes how can I troubleshoot?

Regards,

Abhiram

entry.title: F110 DISPLAY PAYMENT PROPOSAL OUTGOING PAYMENT 0
entry.content:
MARK RED INSTEAD OF GREEN 

PLEASE SOLVE MY PROBLEM

entry.title: APP F110 ERROR (Company codes 557A/557A do not appear in proposal 27.06.2024 ASFG; correct)
Withholding tax Editable mode

entry.title: "Place of supply not determined"
entry.content:
hi All

While posting invoice in MIRO, getting this message "Place of supply not determined"

Im using s/4hana.

Thanks and appreciate your quick feedback.

entry.title: Se16n view change
entry.content: I know there is a way to change the view of tables in tranzaction Se16n /se16 from the first picture to the second one but I can not find

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite - Graph / create requests
entry.content:
Hello everybody!

I'm working on SAP Graph and I'm wondering how a Business Partner could be created. In the moment my Business graph has only one source which is a S4/HANA instance (RISE contract / not cloud).

What I miss is the BusinessPartnerCategory attribute. So at a API POST request using /sap.graph/BusinessPartner I get error 'Business partner category  does not exist'. 

Also the API Navigator says id  -> 'This attribute is required for Create requests'. But I want to create one.

Please  could you give some hints. How should the body of the POST look like.

Thx and best regards,

Ralf Schneider

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite - Graph / Create,Update action on Association
entry.content:
Hi all,

I tried a  API create action on an custom graph object where an association (0 or 1) to another custom object exists. This one have to be also created in the same request.

Is it true that in principal this is not supported by Graph? It is not clear to me by the documentation.

From a logical point of view it should be possible. The key/foreign key association determines the sequence of the underlying API create requests. But it seems not supported.

The response of the API request is 'No cross-service expanding allowed in entity creation/update'.

Thx for a clarification,

Ralf

entry.title: Dunning process
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, I want to know that where can we define multiple payment methods in Dunning process and why do we have 2 payment methods in APP for country and company code. 

Best, 

Mallikarjun

entry.title: Microchart column custom colors issues SAP UI5/FIORI
entry.content:
same applied in samples too is it a bug or any solution please help 

When applied color property its applied to and top label 100 also applied how could I remove it when try to apply with css on the element its working at debug mode but when applied in code its not working

entry.title: Can we reverse an Amazon Pay transaction?
entry.content: After initiating a payment, Amazon Pay can't cancel 7600-786-212 it. If necessary, the merchant or business to whom you submitted the payment can issue a refund to you.

entry.title: What is the refund policy of PayZapp?
entry.content: If a payment is unclaimed, denied or refunded 7600-786-212 for any reason, we will return the money to your Account within 30 Days of the date you initiate payment.

entry.title: paytm wrong transaction complaint number - SAP Community
entry.content: To refund from Paytm for a wrong payment, you should immediately contac t Paytm's custome r suppor t:07077 894 785 and (£√√ available 24/7) custome r support either through thire w…9 hours ago√√¢π

entry.title: Jddj dbdjd djdjd djdjd dndnd ddbbd dndnd
entry.content: Djkd sbdjs dndndd dndn dndndd bdhd dbdb dnd

entry.title: How do I actually talk to someone in Quicken? Call 1-888-569-0146
entry.content:
• How do I actually talk to someone in Quicken?
    To speak with someone at Quicken, call 1-888-569-0146 for direct, personalized support from a live representative regarding any Quicken-related concerns.

  • How do I speak to a human at Quicken?
    Speak to a human at Quicken by calling 1-888-569-0146. Their support team is available to help with any issues you may have with your account or software.

  • How can I talk to a live person in Quicken?
    To talk to a live person at Quicken, simply call 1-888-569-0146. A representative will provide support for any Quicken-related questions or concerns.

  • How do I talk to a real person in Quicken?
    To talk to a real person in Quicken, call 1-888-569-0146 for assistance with account management, software troubleshooting, or other queries.

  • How do I speak to a live person at Quicken?
    To speak to a live person at Quicken, dial 1-888-569-0146 for immediate support from a Quicken representative.

  • How do I talk to a live person in Quicken?
    You can talk to a live person in Quicken by calling 1-888-569-0146 for help with any Quicken-related issues.

  • Can I talk to a real person at Quicken?
    Yes, you can talk to a real person at Quicken by calling 1-888-569-0146. Their team is ready to assist you with any concerns.

  • How do I speak to a representative at Quicken Online?
    To speak to a representative at Quicken Online, call 1-888-569-0146 for live support regarding your Quicken account or software.

  • How do I reach a live person in Quicken?
    To reach a live person at Quicken, call 1-888-569-0146. A representative will assist you with any software or account issues.

  • How do I communicate with Quicken?
    Communicate with Quicken by calling 1-888-569-0146 for direct support, or visit their website for other contact options.

  • How do I contact Quicken by phone?
    To contact Quicken by phone, dial 1-888-569-0146. Their customer support team is available to help with any Quicken-related inquiries.

entry.title: 24x7!! How do I speak to a human at Quicken? [Help~DesK]
entry.content:
How do I speak to a human at Quicken?

To speak to a human at Quicken, call 1-(888)-569-0146 . Use the phone menu to select the appropriate options and wait to be connected to a live support agent.

To contact Quicken customer support, call 1-(888)-569-0146 . Their customer service team can assist with iquiries and troubleshooting related to your Quicken software. 

To reach Intuit Quicken Support call (1-(888)-569-0146. Their team can assist with questions or technical issues related to Quicken software.

The Quicken support number is 1-(888)-569-0146. Call this number for assistance with Quicken .
How do I contact Quicken Desktop support?

To contact Quicken Desktop support, call 1-(888)-569-0146 . Follow the prompts to navigate to the Desktop support team and speak with a representative knowledgeable in Quicken Desktop solutions.

How do I contact Quicken desktop support?

To contact Quicken Desktop support, dial 1-(888)-569-0146 . Use the phone menu to select the Quicken Desktop option, and you will be connected to a support representative who can assist you.

How do I contact Quicken support team?

You can contact the Quicken support team by calling 1-(888)-569-0146 . Follow the prompts to get directed to the appropriate department based on your support needs.

How can I talk to a live person in Quicken?

To talk to a live person in Quicken, call 1-(888)-569-0146 . Follow the automated prompts to reach the correct department and wait to be connected to a live representative.

How do I speak to a live person at Quicken?

To speak to a live person at Quicken, dial 1-(888)-569-0146 . Navigate the phone menu to the relevant support area and stay on the line to be connected with a live agent.

Can I talk to a real person at Quicken?

Yes, you can talk to a real person at Quicken by calling 1-(888)-569-0146 . Follow the phone prompts to reach the support area you need and speak with a live representative.

How do I speak to a human at Quicken?

To speak to a human at Quicken, call 1-(888)-569-0146 . Use the phone menu to select the appropriate options and wait to be connected to a live support agent.
